briefdescription.para: Nothing be changed after create visual.
Only mutable properties are changed.
At least one of immutable properties are changed.
Whole collected map of properties.
Temporal properties that was.
Created visual by CreateVisual API.
Whether transform properties changed.
Whether the processor for update property is registered.
Whether the processor for apply fitting mode is registered.
Creates a VisualBase object.
< Public API

detaileddescription.para: Get attached view. Empty handle if this visual is not be attached.

simplesect.para: The attached view, or empty handle if not be attached.

briefdescription.para: Get the attached container range type. INVALID if this visual is not be attached.

simplesect.para: The attached container range type, or INVALID if not be attached.

briefdescription.para: Detach from the attached view.
Perform an action on a visual registered to this view. Visuals will have actions, this API is used to perform one of these actions with the given attributes.

simplesect.para: If visual is not been registered to the view, action should be ignored.

parameterdescription.para: The action to perform. See Visual to find supported actions.

briefdescription.para: Get the type of this VisualBase.
Sets the value of an existing property.

simplesect.para: BaseHandle is not subclass of Handle. So this API is not use Handle.SetProperty

parameterdescription.para: The new value of the property

briefdescription.para: Retrieves a property value.

simplesect.para: BaseHandle is not subclass of Handle. So this API is not use Handle.SetProperty
This returns the value set by SetProperty() or the animation target value if it is being animated.

briefdescription.para: Gets the name of the VisualBase.
Sets the name of this VisualBase.
Gets the color of the VisualBase.
Sets the color of this VisualBase.
Gets the X offset of the VisualBase.

simplesect.para: The X offset of the VisualBase

briefdescription.para: Sets the X offset of the VisualBase.
Gets the Y offset of the VisualBase.

simplesect.para: The Y offset of the VisualBase

briefdescription.para: Sets the Y offset of the VisualBase.
Gets the width of the VisualBase.
Sets the width of the VisualBase.
Gets the height of the VisualBase.
Sets the height of the VisualBase.
Gets the proportion flags of the VisualBase.

simplesect.para: The proportion flags of the VisualBase

briefdescription.para: Sets the proportion flags of the VisualBase.
Gets the extra width of the VisualBase.

simplesect.para: The extra width of the VisualBase

briefdescription.para: Sets the extra width of the VisualBase. This width will be added to final width absolutly, independent as proportion flags.
Gets the extra height of the VisualBase.

simplesect.para: The extra height of the VisualBase

briefdescription.para: Sets the extra height of the VisualBase. This height will be added to final height absolutly, independent as proportion flags.
Gets the origin of the VisualBase.
Sets the origin of the VisualBase.
Gets the pivot of the VisualBase.
Sets the pivot of the VisualBase.
Gets the borderline color of the VisualBase.
Sets the borderline color of the VisualBase.

detaileddescription.para:
Only supported type of visual has efforts.
If the UiColor has a color ID, it is resolved from the current theme and a binding is registered so the color is automatically refreshed when the theme changes.

briefdescription.para: Sibling Order Change API.

detaileddescription.para: Get the sibling order of the visual object inside of the container.

simplesect.para: The sibling order inside of the container. Or 0 if visual object is not in container.

briefdescription.para: Set the sibling order of the visual object inside of the container.

simplesect.para: It will change other VisualBase's sibling order to keep the order.
It will throw assert if siblingOrder is bigger than the number of visuals that contianer has.

parameterdescription.para: The sibling order inside of the container.

briefdescription.para: Raise the visual object above the next sibling visual object.
Lower the visual object below the previous sibling visual object.
Raise visual object above all other sibling visual objects.
Lower visual object to the bottom of all other sibling visual objects.
Raises the visual object above the target visual object.

simplesect.para: The target visual object is a sibling.

briefdescription.para: Lower the visual object to below the target visual object.

simplesect.para: The target visual object is a sibling.

briefdescription.para: < Called from Internal::VisualsContainer

detaileddescription.para: Get the Container who contain this visual object.

simplesect.para: VisualsContainer who contain this visual object. Or empty container if visual object is not in container.

briefdescription.para: Set the container who contain this visual object.

simplesect.para: It should be called only from Internal::VisualBaseImpl or Internal::VisualsContainer.

parameterdescription.para: VisualsContainer who contain this visual object. Or empty container if visual object is not in container.

briefdescription.para: Detach from container without change the container.

simplesect.para: It should be called only from Internal::VisualBaseImpl or Internal::VisualsContainer.

briefdescription.para: Set the sibling order without change the container.

simplesect.para: It should be called only from Internal::VisualBaseImpl or Internal::VisualsContainer.

parameterdescription.para: The sibling order inside of the container.

briefdescription.para: Get the depth index of visual, depend by sibling order.

simplesect.para: It should be called only from Internal::VisualBaseImpl or Internal::VisualsContainer.

briefdescription.para: Sets the shadow type for this visual object.

detaileddescription.para: This method defines how the visual object should be treated in terms of shadow rendering and corner radius calculations. The shadow type influences the internal constraints and properties applied to the visual, especially when it's registered with a control that supports corner radius overrides.

parameterdescription.para: The type of shadow to be applied to the visual object. Can be NONE, BOX_SHADOW, or INNER_SHADOW.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the currently configured shadow type for this visual object.

detaileddescription.para: This method returns the shadow type that was previously set via SetShadowType. It allows other parts of the system, particularly the VisualsContainer during visual registration or property updates, to query the visual's shadow behavior and apply the corresponding rendering logic and constraints.

simplesect.para: The shadow type of the visual object.

briefdescription.para: Get the Visual::Base object what this object hold.

simplesect.para: It should be called only from Internal::VisualBase or Internal::VisualsContainer.
Latest created Visual::Base object created by VisualBase::CreateVisual();

briefdescription.para: Set the unique id of visual what it registered into control.

parameterdescription.para: The id of visual property registered.

briefdescription.para: Get the unique id of visual what it registered into control.

simplesect.para: The id of visual property registered

briefdescription.para: < Called from other internal class

detaileddescription.para:
Retrieve the property object associated with the given visual property key. It will return invalid property if visual object is not be attached to any view.
Returned Property will be invalidated after we call CreateVisual method.
visualPropertyKey
The key of the visual's property.
The Property object

briefdescription.para: Remove cached data of given index.

simplesect.para: We can call this function at const case since cache is mutable.

parameterdescription.para: The index want to remove cache.

briefdescription.para: Update properties manually.
Performs an action on the visual with the given action id and attributes.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the action to perform this API only takes an Index
The list of attributes for the action. ( optional for this data structure to have content )

briefdescription.para: Destructor.
Constructor - creates a VisualBaseImpl.

memberdef.argsstring: (StringView bindingId, const UiColor &color, T *inst, void(T::*setter)(const Vector4 &))
memberdef.name: SetColorBinding

briefdescription.para: Registers a color binding for theme-aware color updates.

parameterdescription.para: Type of the instance (ViewImpl or a derived class)
The object whose setter will be used as the callback
Member function called both immediately and on theme change

briefdescription.para: Create Visual with Property::Map.

parameterdescription.para: The Creation information of the visual.

briefdescription.para: Get the visual property map.
Set color value internally.
Set borderline color value internally.
Ensure to create Transform class, and return it.
Apply transform infomations to cched visual property map.
Register processor for update property.
Register processor for apply fitting mode.
Update properties for visual.
Apply fitting mode for visual.

parameterdescription.para: The size of the parent control.
The padding of the parent control (start, end, top, bottom). For RTL layouts, start/end should already be swapped by the caller.
